cases.prompt: How do I design a Microsoft Sentinel workspace and control ingestion cost?

expect.label: prefer a single central Log Analytics workspace
route low-value logs to Auxiliary/Basic or ADX archive
commitment tier only after PAYG baseline
use table-level RBAC rather than splitting workspaces

cases.prompt: Move DNS and proxy logs from Analytics to Auxiliary - what's the trade-off and what breaks?

expect.label: Auxiliary logs do not drive scheduled analytics rules
Auxiliary cuts cost roughly an order of magnitude vs Analytics
rule of thumb high-volume low-fidelity logs leave Analytics tier

cases.prompt: Plan first-week connectors and analytics rule rollout for a new M365 tenant Sentinel deployment.

expect.label: prioritise Entra ID, Office 365, Defender XDR, Azure Activity connectors
enable solutions from Content Hub rather than raw rules
tune analytics rules in the first week instead of disabling them
map detections to MITRE ATT&CK for coverage reporting
